info.title: WorkOS API
info.description: WorkOS API for workforce identity management including user management, SSO, directory sync, and audit logs.

tags.name: User Management
tags.description: Manage users, authentication factors, and email verification.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: List events from the WorkOS event stream.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email address has been verified.
Whether the user's email address has been verified.

password_hash.description: A pre-hashed password for the user. Mutually exclusive with password.

password_hash_type.description: The algorithm used to hash the password_hash value.

post.description: Sends a verification email to the user.
Verifies a user's email address using the verification code.

code.description: The verification code sent to the user's email.

get.description: Returns the authentication factors for a user.

delete.summary: Unlink an identity from a user
delete.description: Removes an identity (e.g., OAuth provider) from a user.

parameters.name: identity_id
parameters.description: The ID of the identity to unlink.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of organization memberships.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Filter memberships by status. Comma-separated list.

200.description: A paginated list of organization memberships.

post.description: Creates a new organization membership for a user.

role_slug.description: The slug of the role to assign to the user within the organization.

get.description: Returns an organization membership by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the organization membership.

put.description: Updates an organization membership by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the organization membership.

role_slug.description: The slug of the role to assign.

delete.description: Deletes an organization membership by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the organization membership.

put.description: Activates an organization membership by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the organization membership.

put.description: Deactivates an organization membership by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the organization membership.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of organizations.

parameters.name: domains_include
parameters.description: Filter organizations by domain. Comma-separated list.

parameters.name: domain_data_include
parameters.description: Whether to include domain data in the response.

parameters.name: for_domain
parameters.description: Filter organizations that have the specified domain.

allow_profiles_outside_organization.description: Whether to allow profiles outside the organization's domains.

domains.description: The domains associated with the organization.

allow_profiles_outside_organization.description: Whether to allow profiles outside the organization's domains.

domains.description: The domains associated with the organization.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of SSO connections.

200.description: A paginated list of SSO connections.

get.description: Returns an SSO connection by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the SSO connection.

delete.description: Deletes an SSO connection by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the SSO connection.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of directories.
Returns a paginated list of directory users.

parameters.name: directory_id
parameters.description: Filter directory users by directory ID.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Filter directory users by group ID.

200.description: A paginated list of directory users.

get.description: Returns a directory user by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the directory user.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of directory groups.

parameters.name: directory_id
parameters.description: Filter directory groups by directory ID.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Filter directory groups by user ID.

200.description: A paginated list of directory groups.

get.description: Returns a directory group by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the directory group.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of events from the WorkOS event stream.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: Filter by event types. Provide multiple values to filter by multiple event types.

parameters.name: range_start
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to filter events created after this time.

parameters.name: range_end
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to filter events created before this time.

post.description: Creates a new audit log event.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the event belongs to.

action.description: The event action. Should describe the action taken (e.g., 'user.signed_in').

occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

version.description: The schema version of the event.

actor.description: The actor who performed the action.

id.description: The unique ID of the actor.

name.description: The display name of the actor.

id.description: The unique ID of the target.

name.description: The display name of the target.

location.description: The IP address from which the event originated.

success.description: Whether the event was created successfully.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of invitations.

post.description: Sends an invitation to a user by email.

email.description: The email address of the invitee.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization to invite the user to.

role_slug.description: The slug of the role to assign when the invitation is accepted.

expires_in_days.description: The number of days until the invitation expires.

inviter_user_id.description: The ID of the user sending the invitation.

get.description: Returns an invitation by its token.

post.description: Resends an invitation email by ID.

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Use a WorkOS API key (starting with 'sk_') as the bearer token.

LimitParam.name: limit
LimitParam.description: Maximum number of records to return. Acceptable range is 1-100.

BeforeParam.name: before
BeforeParam.description: Pagination cursor. Fetch records before this cursor.

AfterParam.name: after
AfterParam.description: Pagination cursor. Fetch records after this cursor.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email address has been verified.

profile_picture_url.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the user was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the user was last updated.

allow_profiles_outside_organization.description: Whether to allow profiles outside the organization's domains.

domains.description: The domains associated with the organization.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the organization was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the organization was last updated.

OrganizationDomain.description: A domain associated with an organization.

state.description: The verification state of the domain.

organization_id.description: The ID of the parent organization.

OrganizationMembership.description: A membership associating a user with an organization.

role.description: The role assigned to the user within the organization.

slug.description: The slug identifier of the role.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the membership was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the membership was last updated.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the connection belongs to.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the connection was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the connection was last updated.

domain.description: The domain associated with the directory.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the directory belongs to.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the directory was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the directory was last updated.

DirectoryUser.description: A user synced from a directory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the directory user.

idp_id.description: The user's identifier from the identity provider.

directory_id.description: The ID of the directory the user belongs to.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the user belongs to.

state.description: The state of the directory user.

custom_attributes.description: Custom attributes synced from the directory provider.

groups.description: The groups the user belongs to.

raw_attributes.description: The raw attributes from the directory provider.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the directory user was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the directory user was last updated.

DirectoryGroup.description: A group synced from a directory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the directory group.

idp_id.description: The group's identifier from the identity provider.

directory_id.description: The ID of the directory the group belongs to.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the group belongs to.

name.description: The name of the directory group.

raw_attributes.description: The raw attributes from the directory provider.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the directory group was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the directory group was last updated.

email.description: The email address the invitation was sent to.

accepted_at.description: Timestamp of when the invitation was accepted.

revoked_at.description: Timestamp of when the invitation was revoked.

expires_at.description: Timestamp of when the invitation expires.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the invitation is for.

inviter_user_id.description: The ID of the user who sent the invitation.

token.description: The token used to accept the invitation.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the invitation was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the invitation was last updated.

AuthenticationFactor.description: An authentication factor for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the authentication factor.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the authentication factor was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the authentication factor was last updated.

Event.description: An event from the WorkOS event stream.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the event was created.

before.description: Cursor for fetching the previous page of results.

after.description: Cursor for fetching the next page of results.

code.description: An error code identifying the type of error.

errors.description: A list of specific field-level errors.

message.description: A human-readable description of the field-level error.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

UnprocessableEntity.description: The request body contains invalid or missing fields.
